title: pholidia scaberula
intro: Pholidia scaberula is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the custard apple family. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Caribbean region, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pholidia scaberula include its ability to treat various ailments such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Pholidia scaberula include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
